basic_details.job_title: PAU Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of PAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications, Master's degree in Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications, Knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric Level
qualification.details: First class Bachelor's Degree with subject of Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications. Master's degree with subject of Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications. Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric Level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
